product_title: Delton M201 Wireless Active Noise Cancelling Bluetooth Stereo Business Computer Headset, Black (dbhm201d)
consensus_summary: The Delton M201 is a budget-oriented business headset with mixed reception. Users appreciate its affordable price and adequate noise cancellation for office environments, but report inconsistent audio quality, mediocre call clarity, and durability concerns. Best suited for casual business use rather than professional audio work.
pros: Affordable price point for ANC headset
Adequate noise cancellation for office settings
cons: Audio quality lacks clarity and depth
Microphone picks up background noise poorly
red_flags: High failure rate reported within 6-12 months
